title: chaetogastra divaricata
intro: Chaetogastra divaricata, also known as the Indian ashwagandha or Winter cherry, is a plant species that belongs to the Solanaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Ayurvedic medicine, where it is valued for its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Chaetogastra divaricata include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as herbal tea, capsules, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
